track_types.label: Power Ballad
track_types.description: Slow, emotional, dramatic. Impossible love, longing, separation.
lyric_themes: impossible love between night and day
the curse that keeps them apart
watching from a distance, never touching
transformation at dusk — hawk becoming woman, wolf becoming man
longing across time, across seasons
the pain of almost
love that survives the dark
track_types.suno_style: 80s melodic hard rock power ballad, AOR, slow emotional tempo 65 BPM, powerful soaring female lead vocals, intimate whispered verses building to belted emotional chorus, reverb-drenched clean electric guitar arpeggios, sustain-heavy lead guitar solo, warm piano melody underpinning the verses, lush orchestral string arrangements, anthemic layered backing vocals on chorus, vintage gated snare reverb, analog studio warmth, 1985 production style, photorealistic studio atmosphere

track_types.label: Arena Anthem
track_types.description: Fast, powerful, electrifying. Defiance, freedom, breaking the curse.
lyric_themes: defying the curse, refusing to surrender
the night belongs to them — power, speed, freedom
the hawk soaring above the fire
love that fights back against fate
rising from darkness into light
the roar of the crowd, the rush of adrenaline
unstoppable force of will

track_types.label: Sleaze Rock
track_types.description: Mid-tempo, raw, attitude-driven. Night roads, danger, desire.
lyric_themes: riding through the night with no destination
the wolf hunting under a blood moon
forbidden desire, magnetic pull
don't care about the rules — only the road matters
neon lights and the smell of leather
the hawk watches, the wolf hunts, the night is theirs
danger that feels like home
track_types.suno_style: 80s sleaze rock, glam metal, mid-tempo groove 115 BPM, attitude-driven female vocals with gritty rasp on verses and powerful punch on chorus, dirty overdriven rhythm guitar with bluesy swagger, whammy bar lead guitar licks, deep punchy bass groove, cracking snare drum, raw analog production with slight tape saturation, rebellious street energy, 1987 production style, underground club atmosphere
